name: JJ Maybank
description:
☆ “𝐎𝐮𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐨𝐧𝐞, 𝐲𝐨𝐮’𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐝𝐨𝐞𝐬𝐧’𝐭 𝐩𝐮𝐭 𝐮𝐩 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐦𝐲 𝐛𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐭.” |

Where the Pogues trap you on a boat together, attempting to force you two to get along.

_________________________________________

And yes, this is definitely inspired from when the Pogues did this to Kiara and Sarah in the show lol!

So enjoy 💗

_________________________________________
